app.title: Control Code
app.subtitle: Command center for AI coding agents
home.recent.title: Workspaces
workspace.save.title: Save as workspace...
workspace.open.title: Open "{{name}}"
workspace.open.body: Do you want to close the windows you have open now, or keep them open alongside this workspace?
workspace.resetDefault.title: Discard current workspace?
workspace.resetDefault.body: You have unsaved tabs in the current workspace. Creating a new one will close and discard them — save it first if you want to keep them.
workspace.closeAll.title: Close this workspace's windows?
workspace.closeAll.body: This workspace has {{count}} windows open. Do you want to close all of them, or only this one?
workspace.manage.title: Manage workspaces
workspace.manage.subtitle: Rename, delete or open your saved window/tab layouts
app.exit.title: Close the app?
app.exit.body: You have {{count}} windows open. Do you want to close all of them, or only this one?
terminal.empty: Open a project from Home to get started
